command:
python -u -c 
import urllib.request, ssl, os

out_path = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.04.041/files/sethu_2016_ach-gaba.pdf'
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out_path), exist_ok=True)

# Try Internet Archive / Wayback Machine for a cached version
urls_to_try = [
    'https://web.archive.org/web/2016/https://www.cell.com/article/S0896627316301556/pdf',
    'https://api.fatcat.wiki/v0/file/lookup?doi=10.1016%2Fj.neuron.2016.04.041',
]

ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
ctx.check_hostname = False
ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE

headers = {'User-Agent': 'research-bot/1.0 mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk'}

for url in urls_to_try:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=ctx, timeout=30) as resp:
            data = resp.read()
            ct = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            print(f'URL: {url[:80]}')
            print(f'Status: {resp.status}, Content-Type: {ct}, Size: {len(data)}')
            if data[:4] == b'%PDF' and len(data) > 10000:
                with open(out_path, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(data)
                print('SUCCESS')
                break
            else:
                print(f'Not PDF. First 200: {data[:200]}')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Error {url[:80]}: {e}')
